title: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 2
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|title=''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 2}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Underworld-TheYavinVassilika2.jpg]] |title=''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 2 |writer=[[Mike Kennedy]] |penciller=[[Carlos Meglia]] |inker=Carlos Meglia |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David Stewart]] |cover artist=[[Andrew Robinson]] |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[January 10]], [[2001]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/00-280/Star-Wars-Underworld-2-of-5|text=Star Wars: Underworld 2}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]The date of this story is established internally in relation to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika]]'' |issue=2 }} '''''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 2''' was the second issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika]]'' series of comics. It was released [[January 10]], [[2001]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The race is on as Han Solo and Chewie search the planet Kalkovak for information leading to the legendary Vassilika of Yavin. Things get lively, though, when hardcore bounty hunters Bossk, Dengar, and IG-88 show up with a laundry list of grudges to settle! And there's nothing more explosive than bad blood between scoundrels! Throw in a swaggering Lando Calrissian, a seductive Jozzel Moffet, and a band of curious Jawas, and you've got yourself the fixings for a visit the locals aren't too likely to forget!'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Underworld-TheYavinVassilika2.jpg|Cover File:UnderworldTYV2-FC.png|Cover art File:Underworld2_PC.jpg|Photo variant cover File:UnderworldTYV2-PhotoVariantCover.png|Unlettered photo variant ===Collected in===
